_comment: Lean MCP set for Eigent. Import via Eigent's Connectors -> MCP -> Add -> Local JSON (or add each server individually). Replace <...> placeholders with your real tokens. Never commit real tokens. Port 8888 for SearXNG is deliberate: 8080 is Open WebUI / Jenkins / Tomcat default and SearXNG silently returns HTML (not JSON) when it cannot bind, which breaks mcp-searxng with a misleading 'Invalid JSON format' error. Use 8888 unless you know 8080 is free. See GUIDE.md steps 9-12b and healthtest.md T06-T12. NOTE: Supabase uses local stdio, NOT the remote OAuth-only endpoint at https://api.supabase.com/mcp/v1 (which rejects personal access tokens with 'Session terminated'). The stdio server honors SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN. See GUIDE.md step 12b.
